# Postmortem

## Summary

Describe what happened and why it mattered.

## Impact

Record user, system, data, trust, or operational impact.

## Timeline

List the key events in order.

## Root Cause

State the root cause clearly, not only the symptom.

## Detection and Response

Describe how the issue was detected, contained, and resolved.

## What Went Well

Capture the parts of the response that worked.

## What Failed

Capture gaps in product, implementation, monitoring, process, or docs.

## Follow-Up Actions

List fixes, owner expectations, and which stable lessons should be promoted into shared docs, rules, or skills.
